summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are allowed for this job. The five inventory PRs should remain open for their own review paths; the only routed item is the exact open security-sensitive linked PR #92545.

actions.reason: Focused draft contributor PR with a linked open bug; keep open for normal review rather than close or merge from this shard.
Useful focused PR with proof but no completed review gate; keep open for its own review path.
Narrow useful PR tied to an open issue; keep open for normal review instead of closing from an inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned active PR with review/check blockers; keep open and do not route through inventory cleanup.
Useful but not merge-ready contributor PR with failing proof and unresolved bot findings; keep open for its dedicated review/repair path.
Exact open security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, scoped only to this PR.
